message:
🌱 Add redpanda: rpk should preserve config file ownership:  mission (#1527)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "redpanda-4046-rpk-should-preserve-config-file-ownership",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "redpanda: rpk should preserve config file ownership: ",
+    "description": "rpk should preserve config file ownership: . Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify redpanda troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your redpanda deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda -n redpanda --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review redpanda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant redpanda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nkubectl get configmap -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=redpanda\n```\n### Version & Environment\n\nRedpanda version: latest\n\n### What went wrong?\nFailure starting redpanda with an error similar to:\n```\n Failure during startup: std::__1::system_error (error system:13, open: Permission denied)\n```\nThis has been reported"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for rpk should preserve config file ownership: ",
+        "description": "## Cover letter\n\nThis PR introduces new params Write method, this will be the method to write to our config file through rpk once we migrate away from viper and mapstructure.\n\nRelated PRs:\n- https://github.com/redpanda-data/redpanda/pull/4832\n-\n```yaml\nFailure during startup: std::__1::system_error (error system:13, open: Permission denied)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm rpk should preserve config file ownership:  is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda -n redpanda --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n redpanda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Cover letter\n\nThis PR introduces new params Write method, this will be the method to write to our config file through rpk once we migrate away from viper and mapstructure.\n\nRelated PRs:\n- https://github.com/redpanda-data/redpanda/pull/4832\n- https://github.com/redpanda-data/redpanda/pull/4894\n\nPart of https://github.com/redpanda-data/redpanda/issues/4531\n\n## Release notes\n* none",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Failure during startup: std::__1::system_error (error system:13, open: Permission denied)",
+        "Error: System check 'Data directory is writable' failed. Required: true, Current false",
+        "syschecks - Writing pid file \"/var/lib/redpanda/data/pid.lock\"\nFailure during startup: std::__1::system_error (error system:13, open: Permission denied)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "redpanda",
+      "community",
+      "streaming",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "redpanda"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "repo": "https://github.com/redpanda-data/redpanda",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/redpanda-data/redpanda/pull/4954"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
